kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - Kīlauea volcano is not erupting; the summit eruption in Halemaʻumaʻu is paused. The onset of episode 50 fountains is likely between June 25 and June 27 with June 26 most likely.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
